steps.title: Use two line-of-best-fit points
steps.content: The drawn line of best fit passes approximately through $(1,3.3)$ and $(7,14.5)$. Use those points rather than estimating from the axes.

steps.title: Pick the closest choice
steps.content: Among $0$, $\frac{1}{2}$, $1$, and $2$, the closest value to $1.87$ is $2$. That matches choice D.
